scripts.build: npm run build:kernel && npm run build:host && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:ts: rm -f dist/*.js dist/*.js.map dist/*.d.ts dist/*.d.ts.map && tsgo --project tsconfig.build.json --pretty
scripts.test:artifact: node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --version ${SANDBOX_RELEASE_VERSION:-0.0.0-dev} --root && npm run artifacts:link-current && node --test tests/artifact/*.test.ts
scripts.release:prepare: node --run build && node --run build:init && node --run build:rootfs && node --run build:rootfs:qcow2 && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --version ${SANDBOX_RELEASE_VERSION:-0.0.0-dev} --clean --root && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --version ${SANDBOX_RELEASE_VERSION:-0.0.0-dev} --platform --current
scripts.release:pack: node --run build && node --run build:init && node --run build:rootfs && node --run build:rootfs:qcow2 && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --version ${SANDBOX_RELEASE_VERSION:-0.0.0-dev} --clean --root && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --version ${SANDBOX_RELEASE_VERSION:-0.0.0-dev} --platform --current && npm pack --dry-run ./dist/npm/sandbox && npm pack --dry-run ./dist/npm/sandbox-*
